description: Standard office desk with modesty panel and four corner legs

length_cm.description: Overall width of the desk surface (left to right)

depth_cm.description: Front-to-back dimension of the desk surface

height_cm.description: Floor to top of desktop surface (standard ergonomic desk height)

leg_thick_cm.description: Square cross-section size of each leg

modesty_panel_h_cm.description: Height of the vertical privacy/structure panel at the front face, below the desktop

leg_inset_cm.description: Distance legs are set inward from the outer edges of the desk

sanity_checks.rule: height must be within ergonomic office range
sanity_checks.action: warn if outside range: standard ergonomic desk height is 72-78 cm

sanity_checks.rule: modesty panel must leave kick-space gap above floor
sanity_checks.action: flag: modesty_panel_h_cm is too tall; panel would eliminate kick space — cap at 40% of clear leg height

sanity_checks.rule: depth must be sufficient for a seated user
sanity_checks.action: warn if depth_cm < 50: very shallow desk — may be a console_table instead

sanity_checks.rule: length must exceed depth by a reasonable ratio
sanity_checks.action: flag if ratio < 1.5: unusually square desk footprint — verify furniture type is correct

notes: Modesty panel top edge is flush with the underside of the desktop.
Legs are inset from all four outer edges by leg_inset_cm.
Cable management holes (dia ~5 cm) may appear in the desktop top view as small circles.
If overall_height_cm is extracted by vision, map to height_cm.
If leg_thickness_cm is extracted by vision, map to leg_thick_cm.
